original_question:
Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve are holding a white elephant gift exchange. At the start of the event, they are each holding a present of a different color: Alice has a green present, Bob has a brown present, Claire has a white present, Dave has a black ball, and Eve has a orange ball.
As the event progresses, pairs of people swap gifts. First, Dave and Claire swap their gifts. Then, Dave and Eve swap their gifts. Then, Alice and Claire swap their gifts. Then, Eve and Alice swap their gifts. Finally, Bob and Dave swap their gifts. At the end of the event, Eve has the
Options:
(A) green present
(B) brown present
(C) white present
(D) black ball
(E) orange ball
subquestion: A bakery has three types of bread: whole wheat, white, and rye. The bakery sells 200 loaves of whole wheat bread, 150 loaves of white bread, and 100 loaves of rye bread per day. If the bakery doubles its production of white bread, what will happen to the number of loaves of whole wheat bread and rye bread sold?
answer: The bakery will sell 400 loaves of whole wheat bread and 150 loaves of rye bread per day.
judge_answer:
The bakery will sell 400 loaves of whole wheat bread per day, and the number of rye bread loaves sold will remain 100.

FINAL ANSWER: incorrect
